derived:graph.entities.title: graph.entities
derived:graph.entities.description: 9 entity types extracted from WFS + Census TIGER: substations, tx_lines, hospitals, health_centers, water_plants, barrios, municipios, road_segments, bridges
derived:graph.entities.license: derived from PR government + Census public data

derived:graph.relationships.title: graph.relationships
derived:graph.relationships.description: 6 relationship types: LOCATED_IN, CONNECTS_TO, FEEDS, POWERS, SERVES, CROSSES

derived:graph.road_edges.title: graph.road_edges
derived:graph.road_edges.description: pgRouting-compatible road topology edges (265K edges, 169K vertices)

derived:graph.tx_network.title: graph.tx_network
derived:graph.tx_network.description: ST_Node noded transmission network (74 components, 25 m snap tolerance)

derived:resilience.spof_scores.title: resilience.spof_scores
derived:resilience.spof_scores.description: Betweenness centrality + articulation points on CONNECTS_TO undirected graph; 941 rows, 2 articulation points, top betweenness=0.2197

derived:resilience.cascade_scores.title: resilience.cascade_scores
derived:resilience.cascade_scores.description: Downstream criticality per substation (hospital=10, water_plant=5, health_center=3, barrio=1); 315 substations, max cascade=276.41 (entity_id=877)

derived:resilience.scenario_scores.title: resilience.scenario_scores
derived:resilience.scenario_scores.description: Composite risk scores per substation per scenario (cat3, slr2ft, combined); 945 rows = 315 × 3 scenarios; formula: hazard × cascade × (1 + betweenness)

derived:optimize.intervention_catalog.title: optimize.intervention_catalog
derived:optimize.intervention_catalog.description: Phase 4 intervention catalog: 4 types × top-50 substations = 200 entries; cost model from FEMA BRIC + PREPA post-Maria contracts; cat3 scenario

derived:optimize.portfolio_runs.title: optimize.portfolio_runs + portfolio_items
derived:optimize.portfolio_runs.description: Phase 4 greedy knapsack portfolio: 00M budget, cat3 scenario; 50 interventions, 68M spent, 560 composite-score pts uplift, 3.33 pts/ efficiency

source:census_2020_decennial.title: Census 2020 Decennial - PR Census blocks (census_tabblock20)
source:census_2020_decennial.description: POP20 and HOUSING20 at Census block level. Mirrored Phase 0 via Census TIGER/Line 2024. Population/housing denominator for economy.barrio_economics.
source:census_2020_decennial.note: POP20 2020 Decennial. Income/home-value use PR statewide ACS 2022 medians (B19013=21058, B25077=129900); per-tract ACS needs CENSUS_API_KEY.

derived:economy.barrio_economics.title: economy.barrio_economics
derived:economy.barrio_economics.description: Census 2020 blocks aggregated to Census tract: population, housing_units. Median income 21058 and home value 129900 (PR statewide ACS 2022 — set CENSUS_API_KEY for per-tract). Phase 6: adds poverty_rate (0.435 default), pct_elderly (0.185), pct_disabled (0.255), svi_score (PERCENT_RANK 0-1 of flood_zone_fraction*0.70 + slope_score*0.30; range 0.0-1.0, stddev 0.289). 981 tracts, SRID=32161.
derived:economy.barrio_economics.license: derived from public domain (US Census Bureau)

derived:economy.substation_exposure.title: economy.substation_exposure
derived:economy.substation_exposure.description: VOLL-based 30yr NPV exposure per substation. Population: recursive FEEDS+POWERS->barrio graph, centroid-tract join. Benefit: 0.822 kW/person x 5 USD/kWh x 33.6 hr/yr x NPV 17.29 = 2389 USD/person. 315 substations, 294 with population.
derived:economy.substation_exposure.voll_model: PR avg 0.822 kW/person, VOLL 5 USD/kWh, Cat-3 33.6 hr/yr, NPV 30yr 4pct

derived:optimize.intervention_catalog.v2.title: optimize.intervention_catalog Phase 5
derived:optimize.intervention_catalog.v2.description: Phase 5 catalog: 4 types x 200 substations = 800 entries. Adds population_benefit_usd, economic_benefit_usd, property_impact_usd, net_benefit_per_million. VOLL model from economy.substation_exposure.

derived:optimize.portfolio.ilp.title: optimize portfolio ILP Phase 5
derived:optimize.portfolio.ilp.description: ILP portfolio (scipy.optimize.milp) maximising equity-adjusted net dollar benefit. 500M USD budget, cat3, top-200, equity_weight=1.0. 105 interventions (88 elevation + 17 hardening), 498.8M spent (99.8% binding). Equity-weighted variant at 200M budget: 45 items, 3 substations differ from pure-VOLL; equity-unique substations have higher mean SVI than VOLL-only substations.

derived:resilience.community_resilience.description: Phase 6 community resilience score per barrio. Components: svi_component (1-avg_svi, 50%), infra_density_score (hospital+water_plant+health_center per 1000 pop within 10km, 30%), recovery_factor (from latest portfolio run intervention type, 20%). resilience_score in [0,1] (1=most resilient). 901 barrios, all SRID=32161.

derived:optimize.intervention_catalog.v3.description: Phase 6 catalog: 800 entries (200 substations x 4 types), cat3. Adds weighted_svi (population-weighted SVI across downstream barrio tracts, 189/200 substations differentiated) and equity_adjusted_benefit_usd = pop_benefit x (1 + equity_weight x weighted_svi). DEFAULT_EQUITY_WEIGHT=1.0 for Phase 6 runs. Equity portfolio at 00M budget selects 3 different substations vs pure-VOLL; equity-unique substations have higher mean SVI.

derived:report.scenario_comparison.description: Delta between two portfolio runs: cost, uplift, population, SVI-weighted population, equity flag
derived:report.scenario_comparison.license: derived from PR government GIS + Census 2020

derived:report.narratives.description: AI-generated infrastructure briefings (Sonnet/Opus); title, executive summary, equity findings, tradeoff table, recommended next steps

derived:transport.road_access_cost.description: Phase 8 pgRouting road access cost per barrio to nearest hospital/health_center. pgr_dijkstra at 40 km/h on OSM road network; batched 20 hospitals/call. 901 barrios total: 892 reachable, 9 isolated (Culebra, Vieques, Mona island barrios). Median 9.2 min, max 31.0 min (mountain barrios: Espino, Rubias, Bauta Abajo). Top-5 worst-access barrios injected into AI narrative prompts.
derived:transport.road_access_cost.license: derived from OSM (ODbL) + PR government GIS

derived:transport.bridge_inventory.description: Phase 8 bridge inventory from OSM Overpass API (Puerto Rico). 3168 bridge ways (bridge=yes or bridge=viaduct) with center-point geometry. SRID 32161. 2388 named (75%). Span data not available in OSM tags; BridgeAsset span_m defaults to 50m medium category. WFS source g35_viales_puentes_2010 unusable (all-Infinity coordinates). Loaded 2026-06-07 via Overpass API.
derived:transport.bridge_inventory.computed_by: Overpass API + manual INSERT in prism.transport.schema

derived:sync.data_sources.description: Phase 9 Digital Twin — registry of live data feeds with their last-sync timestamp, checksum, and row count. One row per priority sync source (WFS flood zones, storm surge, primary roads). Idempotent: re-running sync only updates rows when the feature count changes.

derived:sync.sync_log.description: Phase 9 Digital Twin — append-only audit log of every sync run. Records source_name, rows_updated, duration_s, status (ok/error/skipped), triggered_rescore flag, and run timestamp. Used by the dashboard diff panel and for diagnosing sync failures.

derived:corridor.routes.title: Rail corridor route alternatives
derived:corridor.routes.description: Greenfield least-cost-path rail corridors (San Juan-Ponce 3 alts, San Juan-Arecibo, San Juan-Mayaguez). Columns: route_id, from_city, to_city, alternative_n, total_cost_usd, total_km, population_served, svi_weighted_pop, construction_cost_usd, maintenance_30yr_usd, flood_exposure_frac, objective_score, geom (LINESTRING 32161).

derived:corridor.route_segments.title: Rail corridor route segments (terrain-typed)
derived:corridor.route_segments.description: Per-segment breakdown of each corridor alternative. Columns: segment_id, route_id, seq, terrain_type (standard/elevated/tunnel), cost_per_km, km, geom (LINESTRING 32161).
